provenance.rationale: Round 01 importances concentrated on rerank_model (0.41) and embed_model (0.27); all 6 trials in clusters[0] use bge-reranker-large + text-embedding-3-large. Both frozen. Remaining 4 params narrowed to the convex hull of top trials with small buffers: top_k top trials span [8,12] → [6,14]; chunk_size top span [512,704] → [448,768]; chunk_overlap top span [0.15,0.25] → [0.1,0.3]; temperature top span [0.0,0.1] → [0.0,0.2]. Sampler / pruner unchanged — TPE handles the 4-dim space well and 15% pruning rate was balanced.

diff_summary.evidence: top_trials span top_k in [8,12]; statistics.axis_coverage.top_k.sampled_min=3, sampled_max=14 so new band [6,14] sits inside the sampled range; statistics.boundary_hits.top_k.high=3 are all PRUNED/FAIL (sampled-but-poor, not unsampled)

top_trials span chunk_size in [512,704]; statistics.axis_coverage.chunk_size.sampled_min=256, sampled_max=832 so new band [448,768] sits inside the sampled range; boundary_hits.chunk_size.high=2 only in PRUNED/FAIL

top_trials span chunk_overlap in [0.15,0.25]; statistics.axis_coverage.chunk_overlap.sampled_min=0.1, sampled_max=0.4 so new band [0.1,0.3] sits inside the sampled range; boundary_hits.chunk_overlap.high=3 only in PRUNED/FAIL

top_trials span temperature in [0.0,0.1]; statistics.axis_coverage.temperature.sampled_min=0.0, sampled_max=0.9 so new band [0.0,0.2] sits inside the sampled range; boundary_hits.temperature.low=6 concentrated at 0.0

notes: TEMPLATE — not a final schema-valid runtime output. The `provenance.source_bundle_hash` and `provenance.parent_config_hash` fields use the literal `__FILL_AT_ADAPTER__` sentinel, which the adapter replaces with a real sha256 at write time. For a schema-valid materialised example, see `round_02_config.json` in this directory. Freezing rerank_model and embed_model is a 'large change' per anti_patterns.md A7 — reviewer.kind=human required. approved_at left null so adapter will block execution until a human signs off.
